zh: 中国有着五千多年的悠久历史。
en: China has a long history of over 5,000 years.

zh: 全中国的人们都为其悠久的历史和丰富的文化感到自豪。
en: People throughout China are proud of its long history and rich culture.

zh: 英语单词“tea”听起来类似于福建厦门话中“te”的发音。
en: The English word "tea" sounds similar to the pronunciation of "te" in Xiamen, Fujian.

zh: 茶叶主要产自中国南方，因为那里气候温和，土壤肥沃。
en: Tea leaves are produced mainly in the south of China because of the mild climate and rich soil there.

zh: 龙井、普洱、乌龙和铁观音都是名茶。
en: Longjing, Pu'er, Wulong and Tieguanyin are all famous teas.

zh: 它们产自浙江、云南和福建等省份。
en: They are produced in the provinces of Zhejiang, Yunnan and Fujian.

zh: 在过去的几个世纪里，中国人民发展了他们独特的茶文化，包括茶叶种植、采茶、制茶和饮茶。
en: Over the past centuries, Chinese people have developed their unique tea culture, including tea planting, tea-leaf picking, tea making and tea drinking.

zh: 茶是舞蹈、歌曲、诗歌和小说中一个受欢迎的话题。
en: Tea is a popular topic in dances, songs, poems and novels.

zh: 君子之交淡如水。
en: The friendship between gentlemen is as pure as a cup of tea.

zh: 开门七件事：柴、米、油、盐、酱、醋、茶。
en: Firewood, rice, oil, salt, soy sauce, vinegar and tea are necessary to begin a day.

zh: 格林夫妇来中国已经两年了。
en: It's been two years since Mr. and Mrs. Green came to China.

zh: 他们的女儿苏珊娜刚来和他们一起住。
en: Their daughter, Susanna, has just come to live with them.

zh: 她对这個国家知之甚少。
en: She knows very little about the country.

zh: 妈妈，你对中國了解多少？
en: Mom, how much do you know about China?

zh: 中国是一个伟大的国家，拥有大约5000年的历史。
en: China is a great country that has about 5,000 years of history.

zh: 有许多名胜古迹，每年吸引着来自世界各地的数百万游客。
en: There are many places of interest which attract millions of tourists from all over the world every year.

zh: 有美丽的山吗？
en: Are there any beautiful mountains?

zh: 其中一些非常有名，比如泰山、黄山、嵩山和峨眉山。
en: And some of them are very famous, such as Mount Tai, Mount Huang, Mount Song and Mount Emei.

zh: 中国有大量的河流。
en: There are a great number of rivers in China.

zh: 其中，长江是最长的，第二长的是黄河。
en: Among them, the Changjiang River is the longest one and the second longest is the Huanghe River.

zh: 它们是中国文化的发源地。
en: They're the birthplaces of Chinese culture.

zh: 亲爱的，我认为你应该自己去多了解中国。
en: My dear, I think you should get to know more about China by yourself.

zh: 我可以给你拿《中国指南》。
en: I can fetch you Guide to China.

zh: 这是一本详细介绍中国的书。
en: It's a book which introduces China in detail.

zh: 哇！多么宏伟的建筑！为什么大多数建筑的屋顶是黄色的？
en: Wow! What grand buildings! Why are the roofs of most buildings yellow?

zh: 因为在古代中国，黄色是皇权的象征。
en: Because yellow was a symbol of imperial power in ancient China.

zh: 那些刻在石头上的动物是什么？
en: What are those animals that are carved on the stones?

zh: 据说它们是守护整个国家的强大动物。
en: It’s said that they’re powerful animals which guard the whole nation.

zh: 在古代中国，皇帝认为他们自己是真龙天子和天子。
en: In ancient China, emperors thought that they themselves were real dragons and the sons of Heaven.

zh: 龙已经成为中华民族的象征。
en: And the dragon has become a symbol of the Chinese nation.

zh: 没错！它在中国节日中也扮演着重要角色。
en: That’s correct! It also plays an important part in Chinese festivals.

zh: 真有趣！关于龙还有其他什么吗？
en: How interesting! Anything else about dragons?

zh: 是的，有很多关于龙的戏曲、音乐、绘画和谚语。
en: Yes, there are a lot of operas, music, paintings and sayings about dragons.

zh: 中国长城是世界上最伟大的奇迹之一。
en: The Great Wall of China is one of the greatest wonders of the world.

zh: 整个长城有许多分支，长约8800公里。
en: The entire wall, which has many branches, is about 8 800 kilometers long.

zh: 它从东部的山海关一直延伸到西部的嘉峪关。
en: It stretches from Shanhaiguan in the east to Jiayuguan in the west.

zh: 建造始于战国时期，大约2500年前。
en: The construction was begun during the Warring States Period, which was about 2 500 years ago.

zh: 秦、魏、赵、齐、燕和中山等国都修建了城墙来保护他们的人民。
en: The states of Qin, Wei, Zhao, Qi, Yan and Zhongshan all built walls to protect their people.

zh: 第一位皇帝秦始皇将所有这些小城墙连接起来，形成了长城。
en: The first emperor, Qin Shihuang, joined all these smaller walls together to make the Great Wall.

zh: 这些早期由夯土和木材制成的城墙在风雨中磨损了。
en: These early walls that were made of packed earth and wood wore away in the rain and wind.

zh: 这些城墙中很少有留存下来的。
en: Few of these walls remain.

zh: 今天能看到的大部分长城是在明朝建造的。
en: Most of the Great Wall that can be seen today was built during the Ming dynasty.

zh: 它是由石头和砖块制成的，更持久。
en: It was made of stone and brick that would last longer.

zh: 长城最初是由古人建造的，用来将他们与敌人隔开。
en: The Great Wall was first built by ancient people to separate them from their enemies.

zh: 那些明朝的统治者没有料到它后来会被用来吸引游客来中国。
en: Those Ming dynasty rulers did not expect that it would later be used to bring tourists into China.

zh: 俗话说，不到长城非好汉。
en: It is said that he who has never been to the Great Wall is not a true man.

zh: 长城是中华文明的瑰宝，被视为中华民族的象征。
en: The Great Wall is a treasure of Chinese civilization and it is regarded as a symbol of the Chinese nation.

zh: 中国是一个拥有约5000年历史的伟大国家。
en: China is a great country with about 5 000 years of history.

zh: 中国是一个（拥有）约5000年历史的伟大国家。
en: China is a great country (which/that) has about 5 000 years of history.

zh: 这是一本详细介绍中国的书。
en: It is a book with details about China.

zh: 这是一本（详细）介绍中国的书。
en: It is a book (which/that) introduces China in detail.

zh: 其中一些非常著名，例如泰山、黄山、嵩山和峨眉山。
en: And some of them are very famous, such as Mount Tai, Mount Huang, Mount Song and Mount Emei.

zh: 茶的故乡是中国，它拥有4000多年的历史。
en: The home of tea, which has more than 4 000 years of history, is China.

zh: 全中国的人们每天都喝茶。
en: People throughout China drink tea daily.

zh: 在三大饮品——茶、咖啡和可可中，茶是世界上饮用人数最多的。
en: Of the three major drinks — tea, coffee and cocoa, tea is drunk by the largest number of people in the world.

zh: 来自中国的茶，连同丝绸和瓷器，在一千多年前开始为世界所知，并从那时起一直是中国重要的出口商品。
en: Tea from China, along with silk and porcelain, began to be known by the world over a thousand years ago and has been an important Chinese export since then.

zh: 不同语言中“茶”的词语都源自汉字“茶”。
en: The words for “tea” in different languages came from the Chinese character, “cha”.

zh: 英语单词“tea”的发音与它在福建厦门的发音相似。
en: The English word, “tea”, sounds similar to the pronunciation of it in Xiamen, Fujian Province.

zh: 俄罗斯人称之为“cha'i”，这听起来像中国北方发音的“茶叶”。
en: The Russians call it “‘cha’i”, which sounds like “chaye” (tea leaves) as it is pronounced in northern China.

zh: 日文中的“茶”字与中文的写法完全相同，尽管发音略有不同。
en: The Japanese character for “tea’’ is written exactly the same as it is in Chinese, though it is pronounced a little differently.

zh: 茶叶主要产自中国南方，因为那里气候温和、土壤肥沃。
en: Tea leaves are produced mainly in the south of China because of the mild climate and rich soil there.

zh: 龙井、普洱、乌龙和铁观音都是名茶。
en: Longjing, Pu’er, Wulong and Tieguanyin are all famous teas.

zh: 它们产自浙江、云南和福建等省份。
en: They’re produced in the provinces of Zhejiang, Yunnan and Fujian.

zh: 在过去几个世纪里，中国人发展了他们独特的茶文化，包括茶叶种植、采茶、制茶和饮茶。
en: Over the past centuries, Chinese people have developed their unique tea culture, including tea planting, tea-leaf picking, tea making and tea drinking.

zh: 茶也是舞蹈、歌曲、诗歌和小说中一个受欢迎的话题。
en: Tea is also a popular topic in dances, songs, poems and novels.

zh: 君子之交淡如水。
en: The friendship between gentlemen is like a cup of tea.

zh: 开门七件事：柴、米、油、盐、酱、醋、茶。
en: Firewood, rice, oil, salt, sauce, vinegar and tea are necessary to begin a day.

zh: 苏珊娜在《中国指南》这本书里发现了一张图片。
en: Susanna found a picture in the book, Guide to China.

zh: 现在她正在向高先生询问这件事。
en: Now she is asking Mr. Gao about it.

zh: 高先生，图片中的这个人是谁？
en: Mr. Gao, who is the man in the picture?

zh: 孔子，教育领域的先驱。
en: Confucius, a pioneer in the field of education.

zh: 他出生于公元前551年。
en: He was born in the year 551 B.C.

zh: 他是一位伟大的思想家，对人类的本性和行为有许多明智的见解。
en: He was a great thinker who had many wise ideas about human nature and behavior.

zh: 他的主要思想是关于善良和礼貌。
en: His main ideas are about kindness and good manners.

zh: 你能告诉我更多关于他的事吗？
en: Could you tell me more about him?

zh: 他也是一位著名的哲学家，他的名言影响了不同国家的许多人。
en: He was also a famous philosopher whose wise sayings have influenced many people in different countries.

zh: 例如，他的一句名言“学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆”告诉了我们学习和思考的重要性。
en: For example, one of his famous sayings, “He who learns but does not think is lost; he who thinks but does not learn is in danger”, tells us the importance of learning and thinking.

zh: 他真是一个伟大的人，我可以从他身上学到很多。
en: He was really a great man from whom I can learn a lot.

zh: 当他17岁时，他的母亲去世了。
en: And when he was 17, his mother died.

zh: 孔子在三十多岁时开始教书。
en: In his thirties, Confucius began to teach.

zh: 他一生中的其余时间都在教学。
en: He spent the rest of his life teaching.

zh: 五年后，他去世了。
en: Five years later, he passed away.

zh: 孔子68岁时回到了他的家乡鲁国。
en: When he was 68 years old, Confucius returned to Lu, his home state.

zh: 孔子出生于公元前551年的鲁国。
en: Confucius was born in the state of Lu in the year 551 B.C.

zh: 当他3岁时，他的父亲去世了。
en: When he was 3 years old, his father died.

zh: 三人行，必有我师焉。
en: When I walk along with two others, I may be able to learn from them.

zh: 知之为知之，不知为不知，是知也。
en: What you know, you know; what you don’t know, you don’t know.

zh: 温故而知新。
en: Learn the new while reviewing the old.

zh: 有朋自远方来，不亦乐乎？
en: Isn’t it a pleasure that friends come to you with good see you from far away?

zh: 己所不欲，勿施于人。
en: Do not do to others what you would not have them do to you.

zh: 你知道，我这些天对中国历史越来越感兴趣了。
en: You know, I am becoming more and more interested in China’s history these days.

zh: 你能告诉我一些关于名叫郑和的人的事情吗？
en: Could you tell me something about the person named Zheng He?

zh: 郑和出生于1371年。
en: Zheng He was born in 1371.

zh: 他是一位我们中国人民引以为傲的明朝探险家。
en: He was a Ming dynasty explorer whom we Chinese people are proud of.

zh: 你为什么认为他很伟大？
en: Why do you think he was great?

zh: 因为，作为一位船长和宫廷官员，他从1405年到1433年领导了七次海洋航行。
en: Because, as a captain and palace official, he led seven ocean journeys from 1405 to 1433.

zh: 当时，指南针在他的航行中扮演了重要的角色。
en: At that time, the compass played an important role in his sailing.

zh: 他甚至成功地航行到了非洲东海岸。
en: He even succeeded in sailing to the east coast of Africa.

zh: 他的最后一次海洋航行比哥伦布首次航行到美洲早了半个多世纪。
en: His last ocean journey was more than half a century earlier than Columbus’ first journey to America.

zh: 他真是中国的骄傲。
en: He is really the pride of China.

zh: 不幸的是，他于1433年在从非洲回家的途中病逝。
en: Unfortunately, he died of illness on his way home from Africa in 1433.

zh: 谢谢你告诉我这么多。
en: Thank you for telling me so much.

zh: 钱学森于1911年12月11日出生于浙江省杭州市。
en: Qian Xuesen was born in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province on December 11, 1911.

zh: 1934年从上海交通大学毕业后，他横渡太平洋前往美国深造。
en: After his graduation from Shanghai Jiao Tong University in 1934, he traveled across the Pacific Ocean to the United States for further study.

zh: 他在那里获得了航空航天和数学的双博士学位。
en: There he received his Ph.D. degrees in both aerospace and mathematics.

zh: 毕业后，他成为一名教师，同时也是一名研究火箭和导弹理论的研究员。
en: After he graduated, he became a teacher as well as a researcher who studied rockets and missile theories.

zh: 他为中国的导弹和航天计划做出了重要贡献。
en: He made important contributions to the missile and space programs in China.

zh: 当他在1955年回到祖国时，国家的太空研究几乎是一片空白。
en: When he returned to his motherland in 1955, the country’s space research was almost a blank.

zh: 1956年，他建立了第一个火箭和导弹研究所。
en: In 1956, he set up the first research institute of rockets and missiles.

zh: 从那时起，他负责发展中国的导弹、火箭和航天器研究计划。
en: From then on, he was in charge of developing China’s missile, rocket and spacecraft research programs.

zh: 他是这些相关领域的先驱，并被尊称为“中国导弹之父”。
en: He was a pioneer in these related fields and was honored as “The Father of China’s Missiles”.

zh: 他是中国人民的骄傲。
en: He is the pride of the Chinese people.

zh: 他于2009年10月31日逝世，享年98岁，但他仍然是一个激励中国青年的人。
en: He passed away on October 31, 2009 at the age of 98, but he is a man who still encourages Chinese youth.

zh: 他对国家的奉献体现在他的名言中：“我的事业在中国，我的成就在中国，我的归宿在中国！”
en: His devotion to his country was expressed in his saying, “My career is in China, my success is in China and my destination is in China!”

zh: 当有人说如果他留在美国可以赚更多钱时，他笑着说：“我姓钱，但我不爱钱。”
en: When someone said he could make much more money if he stayed in the United States, he laughed and said, “My family name is Qian, but I don’t like qian.”

zh: 他是一位伟大的思想家，对人类本性和行为有许多明智的见解。
en: He was a great thinker who had many wise ideas about human nature and behaviour.

zh: 他也是一位著名的哲学家，其睿智的格言影响了不同国家的许多人。
en: He was also a famous philosopher whose wise sayings have influenced many people in different countries.

zh: 他是一位我们中国人引以为豪的明朝探险家。
en: He was a Ming dynasty explorer whom we Chinese people are proud of.

zh: 你能告诉我更多关于他的事吗？
en: Could you tell me more about him?

zh: 真是难以置信！多么伟大的探险家！
en: It’s hard to believe! What a great explorer!

zh: 它是古代中国送给世界的伟大礼物。
en: It was a great gift to the world from ancient China.

zh: 在它发明之前，水手们不得不依靠星星来找到正确的方向。
en: Before it was invented, sailors had to depend on the star to find the right direction.

zh: 在它发明之后，海洋得以通航。
en: After it was invented, the oceans were open to sail.

zh: 并且在它的帮助下，许多发现得以实现。
en: And many discoveries were made with its help.

zh: 它是最伟大的发明之一。
en: It was one of the greatest inventions.

zh: 据说在3世纪，一个中国人写下了如何制造它的方法。
en: It is said that in the 3rd century a Chinese man wrote about how to make it.

zh: 起初，它被用来制造烟花。
en: At first, it was used for making fireworks.

zh: 在唐朝末期，人们开始将它用于战争。
en: At the end of the Tang dynasty, people began to use it in wars.

zh: 制造它的方法在13和14世纪被带到了阿拉伯世界和欧洲。
en: The method of making it was brought to the Arab world and Europe in the 13th and 14th centuries.

zh: 在它被发明之前，古代中国人在兽骨和石头上刻字。
en: Before it was invented, the ancient Chinese carved characters on animal bones and stones.

zh: 中国是世界上第一个制造它的国家。
en: China was the first country in the world to make it.

zh: 在西汉时期，它在中国的一些地方被制造出来，并在东汉时期由蔡伦加以发展。
en: During the Western Han dynasty, it was made in some places in China, and was developed in the Eastern Han dynasty by Cai Lun.

zh: 他用树皮、绳子和破布制造了它。
en: He made it with bark, ropes and rags.

zh: 它在宋朝由毕昇发展出来。
en: It was developed in the Song dynasty by Bi Sheng.

zh: 他在小块的黏土或木头上刻字，然后在上面刷上墨水。
en: He carved characters on pieces of clay or wood, and then brushed ink on them.

zh: 在字被印到纸上之后，这些黏土或木头块可以再次使用。
en: After the characters were printed on paper, the pieces of clay or wood could be used again.

zh: 后来这项技术传播到了朝鲜、日本和欧洲。
en: Later this technology spread to Korea, Japan and Europe.

zh: 这是当时使用的基本方法。
en: It was the basic method used at that time.

zh: 哦，那是大本钟。
en: Oh, that is Big Ben.

zh: 很久以前，英国女王知道许多时钟的时间不同。
en: Long ago, the queen of England knew that many clocks had different time.

zh: 人们要么早到，要么迟到。
en: People were either early or late.

zh: 她让人建造了它，以便每个人都能有相同的时间。
en: She had it built so that everyone would have the same time.

zh: 现在它是英格兰的象征。
en: Now it is a symbol of England.

zh: 那个看起来像一艘巨大帆船的建筑物呢？
en: What about the building that looks like a huge sailing boat?

zh: 这是一个很好的描述。
en: That is a good description.

zh: 它是澳大利亚悉尼的歌剧院。
en: It’s the Opera House in Sydney, Australia.

zh: 它是澳大利亚人的骄傲。
en: It’s the pride of Australians.

zh: 你知道它下面的图片吗？
en: Do you know the picture below it?

zh: 那是黄石国家公园！
en: That’s the Yellowstone National Park!

zh: 它是世界上第一个国家公园。
en: It is the world’s first national park.

zh: 它位于美国西部。
en: It is in the western United States.

zh: 没错，但你知道埃菲尔不仅设计了自由女神像，还设计了埃菲尔铁塔吗？
en: That’s right, but do you know that Eiffel designed not only the Statue of Liberty but also the Eiffel Tower?

zh: 他是艺术界的伟大领袖。
en: He was a great leader in the arts.

zh: 这是埃菲尔铁塔吗？
en: Is this the Eiffel Tower?

zh: 是的，它是为1889年巴黎国际博览会建造的。
en: Yes, it was built for the International Exhibition of Paris in 1889.

zh: 我真的希望有一天我能参观其中一些地方。
en: I really hope I can visit some of these places some day.

zh: 嗨，康康，你的英雄是谁？
en: Hi, Kangkang, who is your hero?

zh: 我的英雄是亚伯拉罕·林肯。
en: My hero is Abraham Lincoln.

zh: 尽管他既贫穷又没有受过多少教育，但他从未放弃读书。
en: Although he was both poor and didn't have much education, he never gave up reading books.

zh: 他成为了美国最伟大的总统之一。
en: He became one of the greatest presidents of the USA.

zh: 玛丽·居里是我的英雄。
en: Marie Curie is my hero.

zh: 她不仅发现了镭，而且在她的一生中两次获得诺贝尔奖。
en: Not only did she discover radium but also she won the Nobel Prize twice in her lifetime.

zh: 你写的是谁，李明？
en: Who did you write about, Li Ming?

zh: 我钦佩托马斯·爱迪生，既因为他的探索精神，也因为他的伟大发明。
en: I admire Thomas Edison both for his exploring spirit and for his great inventions.

zh: 在他的一生中，他发明了2000多种新东西，包括电灯泡、电报和摄影胶片。
en: During his lifetime he invented more than 2 000 new things, including the light bulb, the telegraph and photographic film.

zh: 我想我们从世界各地的名人身上学到了很多。
en: I think we have learned a lot from the famous people around the world.

zh: 亚伯拉罕·林肯于1809年出生在肯塔基州。
en: Abraham Lincoln was born in Kentucky in 1809.

zh: 他的母亲在他十岁时去世了。
en: His mother died when he was ten years old.

zh: 后来，他的家人搬到了伊利诺伊州，他的父亲再婚了。
en: Later, his family moved to Illinois and his father remarried.

zh: 家里很穷，所以他们不得不为生存而挣扎。
en: The family was poor, so they had to struggle just to live.

zh: 在伊利诺伊州，既没有老师也没有学校，但林肯的继母鼓励他学习。
en: In Illinois, there were neither teachers nor schools, but Lincoln’s stepmother encouraged him to study.

zh: 他在农场工作的同时学会了读写。
en: He learned to read and write while working on the farm.

zh: 二十一岁时，林肯离开了家。
en: At twenty-one, Lincoln left home.

zh: 他很快就获得了律师执照，成为了一名律师。
en: He soon received a law license and became a lawyer.

zh: 人们信任他，并开始称他为“诚实的亚伯”。
en: People trusted him and began to call him “Honest Abe”.

zh: 在接下来的几年里，他更积极地参与政治。
en: During the following years, he took a more active part in politics.

zh: 很快，他不仅成了一位备受尊敬的律师，还成了一位著名的政治家。
en: Soon he was not only a highly respected lawyer but also a well-known politician.

zh: 他于1860年当选为美国第十六任总统，第二年内战爆发了。
en: He was elected the sixteenth president of the United States in 1860, and in the next year the Civil War broke out.

zh: 内战发生在想要脱离联邦并建立自己国家的南部各州与想要将所有州保持为一个国家的北部各州之间。
en: The Civil War was between the southern states that wanted to leave the Union and form their own country, and the northern states that wanted to keep all the states as one country.

zh: 南部各州希望保留允许他们拥有奴隶的法律。
en: The southern states wanted to keep the laws that allowed them to own slaves.

zh: 北部各州和林肯总统都希望废除这些法律。
en: Both the northern states and President Lincoln wanted to get rid of those laws.

zh: 1865年4月9日，内战结束，所有奴隶都获得了自由。
en: On April 9, 1865, the Civil War ended and all slaves were set free.

zh: 不到一周后，即1865年4月14日，亚伯拉罕·林肯在华盛顿特区的福特剧院被枪击。
en: Less than a week later, on April 14, 1865, Abraham Lincoln was shot at the Ford Theatre in Washington, DC.

zh: 他于第二天因伤去世。
en: He died the next day from his wounds.

zh: 埃及金字塔建于公元前2560年左右。
en: The Egyptian pyramids were built around 2 560 B.C.

zh: 其中最大的是胡夫大金字塔。
en: The largest one of them is the Great Pyramid of Khufu.

zh: 它是世界七大奇迹之一。
en: It is one of the Seven Wonders of the World.

zh: 国王胡夫建造了大金字塔作为他的陵墓。
en: The King, Khufu, built the Great Pyramid as his tomb.

zh: 研究表明，它花了10万人超过20年的时间才完成。
en: Studies show that it took 100 000 people over 20 years to complete it.

zh: 公元19世纪，大金字塔被认为是一座独特的建筑。
en: The Great Pyramid was considered a unique building in the 19th century A.D.

zh: 在当时，它仍然是世界上最高的建筑。
en: At that time, it was still the tallest building in the world.

zh: 根据科学研究，古代国王胡夫命令他的人员一块石头一块石头地建造大金字塔。
en: According to scientific research, the ancient King, Khufu, ordered his men to build the Great Pyramid stone by stone.

zh: 最大的石头重达15吨。
en: The biggest stone weighs as much as 15 tons.

zh: 每块石头都固定得非常好，尽管古代工人没有我们现代的工具。
en: Each stone was fixed so well, though the ancient workers didn’t have our modern tools.

zh: 大金字塔有四个面，每个面长230.4米，高146.5米。
en: The Great Pyramid has four sides and each side is 230.4 meters long and 146.5 meters high.

zh: 那时，没有现代化的机器或设备，那么古埃及人是如何建造大金字塔的呢？
en: At that time, there were no modern machines or equipment, so how did the ancient Egyptians build the Great Pyramid?

zh: 直到今天，这仍然是一个谜。
en: To this day, it is still a mystery.

zh: 但许多科学家继续研究他们的方法。
en: But many scientists continue to study their methods.

zh: 大金字塔的建成展示了古埃及劳动人民的智慧和成就。
en: The completion of the Great Pyramid shows the wisdom and the achievements of ancient Egyptian working people.

zh: 很久很久以前，有一个男孩每天在山上放羊。
en: Long long ago, there was a boy who grazed sheep on a hill every day.

zh: 一天，男孩感到有点孤单，想捉弄在山脚下工作的农民们。
en: One day, the boy felt a little lonely and wanted to make fun of the farmers working at the foot of the hill.

zh: 于是他爬上一块大石头，喊道：“狼来了！狼来了！”
en: So he climbed up a big stone and shouted, “Wolves are coming! Wolves are coming!”

zh: 不一会儿，农民们赶来，却发现根本没有狼。
en: In a minute, the farmers came only to find there were no wolves at all.

zh: 看到农民们上当了，男孩笑着说：“我只是在开玩笑。”
en: Seeing the farmers were taken in, the boy laughed and said, “I’m just joking.”

zh: 然后农民们摇摇头离开了。
en: Then the farmers shook their heads and left.

zh: 几天后，农民们又听到男孩喊叫。
en: A few days later, the farmers heard the boy shout again.

zh: 于是他们跑上山，发现再次被骗了。
en: So they ran up the hill and found that they were cheated again.

zh: 又一天，几只狼真的来了。
en: Another day, several wolves really came.

zh: 男孩吓坏了，大声喊道：“救命！狼来了！”
en: The boy was frightened and cried out, “Help! Wolves have come!”

zh: 但这一次，没有人来。
en: But this time, no one came.

zh: 有一个关于中国象棋的真实故事。
en: There is a true story about Chinese chess.

zh: 这个故事发生在大约2000年前。
en: The story happened about 2,000 years ago.

zh: 为了在秦始皇死后推翻秦朝，农民们与政府作战。
en: In order to bring down the Qin dynasty after the death of Emperor Qin Shihuang, the peasants fought the government.

zh: 其中，两支最强大的军队由项羽和刘邦率领。
en: Among them, the two strongest armies were led by Xiang Yu and Liu Bang.

zh: 为了决定谁将成为新皇帝，他们之间进行了一场伟大的决战。
en: In order to decide who would become the new emperor, there was a great final battle between them.

zh: 战场沿着楚河。
en: The battlefield was along the Chu River.

zh: 最后，刘邦和他的军队赢得了战斗。
en: Finally, Liu and his army won the battle.

zh: 所以他成为了皇帝。
en: So he became the emperor.

zh: 人们为了纪念这场著名的战役而创造了中国象棋。
en: People created Chinese chess in memory of the famous battle.

zh: 你听说过关于许仙和白蛇的浪漫故事吗？
en: Have you ever heard of the romantic tale about Xu Xian and the White Snake?

zh: 你知道它发生在哪里吗？
en: Do you know where it happened?

zh: 据说这个故事发生在西湖。
en: It is said that the story happened at the West Lake.

zh: 西湖是中国最美丽的湖泊之一。
en: The West Lake is one of the most beautiful lakes in China.

zh: 它位于浙江省杭州市，每年吸引大量国内外游客。
en: It lies in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province and attracts lots of tourists from home and abroad every year.

zh: 西湖三面环山。
en: The West Lake is surrounded on three sides by mountains.

zh: 那里的许多旅游景点都很值得一游，例如苏堤、断桥和雷峰塔。
en: Many tourist attractions there are well worth visiting, such as Sudi Causeway, the Broken Bridge and Leifeng Pagoda.

zh: 景色如此迷人，游客们常常沉醉其中。
en: The scenery is so attractive that visitors often lose themselves in it.

zh: 西湖之所以闻名，不仅因为其独特的景色，还因为一些主要由白居易和苏东坡创作的美丽诗篇。
en: The West Lake has become famous not only because of its special scenery but also because of some beautiful poems that were written mainly by Bai Juyi and Su Dongpo.

zh: 此外，西湖周围的地区是著名龙井茶的故乡。
en: Besides, the area that surrounds the West Lake is the home of the famous Longjing tea.

zh: 你去过西湖吗？
en: Have you ever been to the West Lake?

zh: 如果没去过，你一定要找个机会去那里！
en: If not, you must find a chance to go there!

zh: 迈克尔：康康，我听说你中国象棋下得很好。
en: Michael: Kangkang, I hear that you can play Chinese chess very well.

zh: 你能教我下棋吗？
en: Could you teach me how to play it?

zh: 玛丽亚：对我来说学下中国象棋很难。
en: Maria: It is hard for me to learn to play Chinese chess.

zh: 在我的空闲时间，我更喜欢看电视，尤其是电视剧。
en: In my spare time, I prefer watching TV, especially TV plays.

zh: 我认为女演员们很有魅力。
en: I think the actresses are attractive.

zh: 简：我想成为像在电视上看到的歌星那样著名的歌手。
en: Jane: I want to be a famous singer like the singing stars I see on TV.

zh: 迈克尔：我宁愿看体育节目也不看那些节目。
en: Michael: I would rather watch sports shows than those ones.

zh: 我最喜欢看足球比赛。
en: I like watching soccer games best.

zh: 你在空闲时间看电视节目吗？
en: Do you watch TV programs in your spare time?

zh: 你更喜欢哪种节目，电视剧还是体育节目？
en: Which kind of program do you prefer, TV plays or sports shows?

zh: 我宁愿看电视剧也不看体育节目。
en: I would rather watch TV plays than sports shows.

zh: 康康：你今天看起来有点累。你还好吗？
en: Kangkang: You look a little tired today. Are you all right?

zh: 玛丽亚：（用疲惫的声音）没什么。可能是因为我昨晚看电视太晚了。
en: Maria: (In a tired voice) It’s nothing. Maybe it’s because I watched TV too late last night.

zh: 康康：（惊讶地）什么节目这么吸引你？
en: Kangkang: (In surprise) What program attracted you so much?

zh: 玛丽亚：一个关于科幻电影的节目。
en: Maria: A program about science fiction movies.

zh: 康康：科幻电影？哇！我也对它们很感兴趣。
en: Kangkang: Science fiction movies? Wow! I’m very interested in them, too.

zh: 康康：节目里提到了哪些电影？
en: Kangkang: What movies were mentioned in the program?

zh: 玛丽亚：《时间机器》、《E.T.》和《火星任务》。
en: Maria: The Time Machine, E.T. and Mission to Mars.

zh: 康康：听起来很棒！我上周末看了《E.T.》。它非常有趣。
en: Kangkang: Sounds great! I saw E.T. last weekend. It was very interesting.

zh: 玛丽亚：真的吗？《火星任务》明天将会上映。
en: Maria: Really? Mission to Mars will be shown tomorrow.

zh: 玛丽亚：它是关于火星上的冒险的。
en: Maria: It’s about adventures on Mars.

zh: 玛丽亚：简和我明天放学后会去看。
en: Maria: Jane and I will see it after class tomorrow.

zh: 玛丽亚：你想和我们一起去吗？
en: Maria: Would you like to go with us?

zh: 康康：是的，我想去。谢谢！
en: Kangkang: Yes, I’d like to. Thanks!

zh: 这部电影是根据一个科幻故事改编的。
en: This movie is based on a science fiction story.

zh: 一位科学家兼发明家决定证明时间旅行是可能的。
en: A scientist and inventor decides to prove that time travel is possible.

zh: 他想要改变过去。
en: He wants to change the past.

zh: 为了测试他的想法，他在自己的发明——一台时间机器的帮助下，旅行到了80万年后的未来。
en: To test his idea, he travels 800,000 years into the future with the help of his own invention — a time machine.

zh: 它将于8月25日至29日在国家剧院上演。
en: It will be put on in the National Theatre from Aug. 25th to 29th.

zh: 一群外星人访问地球，其中一位名叫E.T.的迷路了，并被留在了这个星球上。
en: A group of aliens visit the earth and one of them, E.T., gets lost and is left on this planet.

zh: 他被一个10岁的男孩艾略特发现了。
en: He is found by a 10-year-old boy, Elliot.

zh: 很快，两人开始交流并建立起一种不同寻常的友谊。
en: Soon the two begin to communicate and start a different kind of friendship.

zh: E.T.想回家，但如果艾略特帮助他，他就会失去一个朋友。
en: E.T. wants to go home, but if Elliot helps him, he’ll lose a friend.

zh: 它将于9月1日至5日在国家剧院上映。
en: It’ll be shown in the National Theatre from Sept. 1st to 5th.

zh: 公元2020年，一场神秘的风暴摧毁了首次载人火星任务，除一名船员外全部遇难。
en: In the year 2020 A.D., a mysterious storm kills all but one crew member of the first manned mission to Mars.

zh: 一项救援任务启动了。
en: A rescue mission is launched.

zh: 它将于8月26日至30日在国家剧院上演。
en: It will be on in the National Theatre from Aug. 26th to 30th.

zh: 第82届奥斯卡颁奖典礼，旨在表彰2009年最佳电影，于2010年3月7日星期日在好莱坞的柯达剧院举行。
en: The 82nd Academy Awards Ceremony, honoring the best in film for 2009, was held on Sunday, March 7, 2010, at the Kodak Theatre in Hollywood.

zh: 奥斯卡获奖者名单包括：
en: A list of winners of the Oscars included:

zh: 最佳影片：《拆弹部队》
en: Motion Picture: The Hurt Locker

zh: 最佳男演员：杰夫·布里吉斯，《疯狂的心》
en: Actor: Jeff Bridges, Crazy Heart

zh: 最佳女演员：桑德拉·布洛克，《弱点》
en: Actress: Sandra Bullock, The Blind Side

zh: 最佳导演：凯瑟琳·毕格罗，《拆弹部队》
en: Director: Kathryn Bigelow, The Hurt Locker

zh: 凯瑟琳成为有史以来第一位获得该奖项的女性。
en: Kathryn became the first woman ever to win the award.

zh: 此次展览将展出这位著名西班牙艺术家的300幅油画和素描。
en: The show will present 300 of the famous Spanish artist’s paintings and drawings.

zh: 这是对毕加索职业生涯的一次全面回顾。
en: It is a general review of Picasso’s career.

zh: 对于艺术爱好者来说，这是一个欣赏这位伟大艺术家众多作品的绝佳机会。
en: It is a wonderful chance for art lovers to see so many works of the great artist.

zh: 通过展示这些作品，展览旨在告诉人们：巴勃罗·毕加索永远不会过时。
en: By showing these works, the exhibition wants to tell people: Pablo Picasso never gets old.

zh: 著名足球明星大卫·贝克汉姆希望他的三个儿子能追随他的脚步。
en: The famous football star, David Beckham, would love his three boys to follow in his footsteps.

zh: 他在一次采访中说：“他们真的很喜欢踢足球，而且……”
en: He said in an interview, “They’re really into playing football and…”

zh: 在中国，电视非常受欢迎。
en: In China, television is very popular.

zh: 许多人把大部分空闲时间花在看电视上。
en: Many people spend most of their spare time watching it.

zh: 它对人们的生活有着巨大的影响。
en: It has a huge influence on people’s lives.

zh: 所有这些电视对我们是好还是坏呢？
en: Is all this television good for us or bad for us?

zh: 众所周知，电视是获取信息最重要的方式之一，例如世界各地的新闻、历史、文化和有趣的故事。
en: As is known to all, television is one of the most important ways of getting information, such as the news all over the world, history, culture and interesting stories.

zh: 它为我们提供了一种更生动的方式来发现外部世界。
en: It provides us with a more lively way to discover the outside world.

zh: 此外，我们还可以观看精彩的电影、戏剧和音乐会。
en: Also, we can see great movies, operas and concerts.

zh: 因此，电视不仅是我们了解世界的一种方式，也是一种很好的娱乐。
en: Therefore, television is not only a way we learn about the world, but also a good entertainment.

zh: 然而，许多人认为电视对我们有害。
en: However, many people think television is bad for us.

zh: 他们说电视上所有的暴力都会使人变得暴力。
en: They say that all the violence on TV makes people become violent.

zh: 暴力会给孩子带来不好的想法。
en: Violence can give children bad ideas.

zh: 电视也会使人变得懒惰。
en: TV can also make people lazy.

zh: 他们通常不做户外活动，而是连续几个小时坐在屏幕前欣赏有趣的节目和卡通片。
en: Instead of doing outdoor activities, they usually sit in front of the screen for hours enjoying the funny shows and cartoons without a break.

zh: 总的来说，问题不在于电视，而在于我们选择观看的节目。
en: In general, the problem is not television, but the programs we choose to watch.

zh: 我们已经学会了如何在报纸、书籍和杂志中选择最好的。
en: We have learned how to choose the best in newspapers, books and magazines.

zh: 现在我们也必须学会处理电视节目。
en: Now we have to learn to do with television programs, too.

zh: 毕竟，这是我们的选择。
en: After all, it’s our choice.

zh: 迈克尔：康康，你最喜欢的文学人物是谁？
en: Michael: Kangkang, who is your favorite character in literature?

zh: 康康：美猴王是我最喜欢的中国文学人物。
en: Kangkang: The Monkey King is my favorite character in Chinese literature.

zh: 他是小说《西游记》中的一位英雄，这部小说是中国四大古典文学名著之一。
en: He is a hero in the novel called Journey to the West, which is one of the four classic novels of Chinese literature.

zh: 迈克尔：哦，但我更喜欢哈利·波特。
en: Michael: Oh, but I like Harry Potter better.

zh: 我认为他是我所知道的最勇敢的人物。
en: I think he is the bravest character I’ve ever known.

zh: 康康：也许你是对的，但我更喜欢美猴王。
en: Kangkang: Maybe you are right, but I prefer the Monkey King.

zh: 他既有趣又聪明。
en: He is funny and clever.

zh: 简：他们当然是英雄。
en: Jane: They are certainly heroes.

zh: 而且我认为朋友在这两个故事中都很有帮助。
en: And I think friends are helpful in both stories.

zh: 为了帮助哈利，他的朋友们读了很多书，并找到了打败敌人的最佳方法。
en: In order to help Harry, his friends read many books and discovered the best way to defeat their enemies.

zh: 康康：是的，他的朋友们就像沙僧和猪八戒一样，既聪明又有帮助。
en: Kangkang: Yes, his friends are wise and helpful just like Sandy and Pigsy.

zh: 事实上，正是沙僧和猪八戒帮助美猴王赢得了每一次战斗。
en: In fact, it was Sandy and Pigsy who helped the Monkey King win every battle.

zh: 在我看来，没有朋友的帮助，美猴王和哈利·波特都不会成为英雄。
en: In my view, neither the Monkey King nor Harry Potter would become a hero without the help of their friends.

zh: 独木不成林。
en: One tree can’t make a forest.

zh: 在哈利·波特的故事中，他的朋友们读了很多书，这是帮助他打败敌人的最佳方式。
en: In the story of Harry Potter, his friends read many books and the best way to help him to defeat their enemies.

zh: 因此，没有朋友的帮助，无论是美猴王还是哈利·波特都不会成为英雄。
en: Therefore, neither the Monkey King nor Harry Potter would become a hero without the help of their friends.

zh: 看，杨老师！一张李白的画像。
en: Look, Miss Yang! A picture of Li Bai.

zh: 我昨晚读了他的诗《静夜思》。
en: I read his poem Still Night Thoughts last night.

zh: 它易于理解且非常感人。
en: It was easy to understand and very moving.

zh: 您了解他的生平和诗歌吗？
en: Do you know anything about his life and poetry?

zh: 是的，李白生活在唐朝。
en: Yes, Li Bai lived during the Tang dynasty.

zh: 他被认为是中国最伟大的浪漫主义诗人之一。
en: He is considered to be one of the best romantic poets in China.

zh: 在他的一生中，他创作了大量诗歌。
en: In his lifetime, he wrote a lot of poetry.

zh: 他有900多首诗至今仍在被人们传诵。
en: More than 900 of his poems are still read today.

zh: 我读到的关于他的文章说，他和英国诗人威廉·莎士比亚一样伟大。
en: The passage I read about him said that he was as great as the British poet William Shakespeare.

zh: 看，那里有他的画像！
en: Look, there is his picture!

zh: 李白和莎士比亚都是非常重要的诗人。
en: Li Bai and Shakespeare were both very important poets.

zh: 你知道莎士比亚也是一位著名的剧作家。
en: You know that Shakespeare was also a famous playwright.

zh: 他的许多戏剧是关于英国历史的，而其他一些则是喜剧和悲剧。
en: Many of his plays were about British history while others were comedies and tragedies.

zh: 他最著名的戏剧是关于人性黑暗面的。
en: His most famous dramas were about the dark side of human nature.

zh: 《哈姆雷特》和《罗密欧与朱丽叶》就是这类戏剧的例子。
en: Hamlet and Romeo and Juliet are examples of this kind of plays.

zh: 《罗密欧与朱丽叶》在全世界非常受欢迎，这部戏中最悲伤的场景之一是朱丽叶亲吻罗密欧然后死去。
en: Romeo and Juliet is very popular around the world, and one of the saddest scenes in this play is when Juliet kisses Romeo and then dies.

zh: 威廉·华兹华斯是1800年至1850年间英国主要的诗人之一。
en: William Wordsworth was one of the leading British poets from 1800 to 1850.

zh: 他在英格兰西北部的湖区长大。
en: He grew up in the Lake District in northwest England.

zh: 他的父母在他小时候就去世了，他与祖父母的生活并不很快乐。
en: His parents died when he was a child, and his life with his grandparents was not very happy.

zh: 为了感觉好一些，他喜欢去山里长时间散步或乘船游览。
en: To feel better, he loved to go for long walks in the mountains or to take boat rides.

zh: 他拥有丰富的想象力，并写诗描绘自然的力量、美丽和神秘。
en: He had a strong imagination, and wrote poems about the power, beauty and mystery of nature.

zh: 从剑桥大学毕业后，他搬到了法国。
en: After he graduated from Cambridge University, he moved to France.

zh: 几年后，他回到了湖区，并开始创作关于自然的诗歌。
en: A few years later, he returned to the Lake District and began to write poems about nature.

zh: 他经常在长时间的散步中创作诗歌。
en: He often created his poems during long walks.

zh: 然后他把诗念给他的妹妹多萝西听，多萝西为他记录下来。
en: And then he told them to his sister, Dorothy, who wrote them down for him.

zh: 与他之前的其他诗人不同，华兹华斯在诗中运用简单的语言，并描绘普通人的生活。
en: Unlike other poets before him, Wordsworth used simple language in his poems, and he described the lives of common people.

zh: 在一首诗中，华兹华斯解释了他每次看到彩虹时是多么快乐：
en: In one poem, Wordsworth explained how happy he was each time he saw a rainbow:

zh: 每当我看见天空中的彩虹，我的心就雀跃；
en: My heart leaps up when I behold a rainbow in the sky;

zh: 我生命开始时便是如此；
en: So was it when my life began;

zh: 如今我已长大成人，依然如此；
en: So it is now I am a man;

zh: 但愿我年老时依旧如此，否则宁愿死去！
en: So be it when I shall grow old, or let me die!

zh: 孩童是成人之父；
en: The Child is father of the Man;

zh: 我愿每一天都由自然的虔诚彼此相连。
en: And I could wish my days to be bound each to each by natural piety.

zh: 威廉·莎士比亚是一位剧作家也是一位诗人。
en: William Shakespeare is a playwright as well as a poet.

zh: 他一生中写了许多喜剧、悲剧和历史剧，但他最著名的是他的悲剧。
en: He wrote many comedies, tragedies and history plays during his lifetime, but he is best-known for his tragedies.

zh: 莎士比亚于1564年出生在英格兰的一个小镇。
en: Shakespeare was born in a small town in England in 1564.

zh: 莎士比亚从小就对演戏感兴趣。
en: From an early age, Shakespeare was interested in acting in plays.

zh: 当他年纪大一些时，他搬到了伦敦市成为一名演员。
en: When he was older, he moved to the city of London to become an actor.

zh: 在那里他开始写自己的剧本。
en: There he began to write his own plays.

zh: 最终，他成为了女王最喜欢的剧作家。
en: Eventually, he became the Queen’s favorite playwright.

zh: 他写了许多通常有十四行的爱情诗和超过30部剧本。
en: He wrote many love poems usually with fourteen lines and more than 30 plays.

zh: 当他49岁时，他搬回了他的家乡。
en: When he was 49, he moved back to his hometown.

zh: 他于1616年在那里去世。
en: There he died in 1616.

zh: 也许你是对的，但我更喜欢美猴王。
en: Maybe you are right, but I prefer the Monkey King.

zh: 在我看来，如果没有朋友的帮助，美猴王和哈利·波特都不会成为英雄。
en: In my view, neither the Monkey King nor Harry Potter would become a hero without the help of their friends.

zh: 但德拉感到非常难过，因为她没有钱为她的丈夫吉姆买礼物。
en: But Della feels very sad, because she has no money to buy a present for her husband, Jim.

zh: 事实上，德拉和吉姆有两件珍贵的财产。
en: In fact, Della and Jim have two precious possessions.

zh: 它们是吉姆的金表和德拉美丽的长发，这是他们唯一的财富。
en: They are Jim’s gold watch and Della’s long beautiful hair, which are the only wealth for them.

zh: 德拉剪掉了她的头发，卖了它，并为吉姆买了一条金表链。
en: Della had her hair cut, sold it and bought a gold watch chain for Jim.

zh: 现在，德拉在家里。
en: Now, Della is at home.

zh: 突然，门开了，吉姆走了进来。
en: All of a sudden, the door opens and Jim comes in.

zh: 吉姆，别那样看着我。
en: Jim. Don’t look at me that way.

zh: 我把头发剪掉卖了，因为如果我不送你礼物，我无法度过这个圣诞节。
en: I had my hair cut off and sold it because I couldn’t have lived through Christmas without giving you a present.

zh: 吉姆，它很快就会长出来的。
en: Jim, it will grow quickly.

zh: 说“圣诞快乐！”吉姆，让我们高兴起来。
en: Say “Merry Christmas!” Jim, and let’s be happy.

zh: 你把头发剪掉了？
en: You’ve cut off your hair?

zh: 我把它剪掉卖了。
en: I’ve cut it off and sold it.

zh: 我告诉你，卖了，也没了。
en: I tell you, sold and gone, too.

zh: 我卖掉我的头发是为了能在圣诞节送你点东西。
en: I sold my hair so that I could give you something for Christmas.

zh: 嗯，德拉，我确实理解。别担心。你剪了不同的发型这个事实，绝不可能让我减少对你的爱。
en: Well, Della, I do understand. Don’t worry. The fact that you have a different hair cut could not possibly make me love you less.

zh: 我知道你是为了我才卖掉头发的。
en: I know you sold your hair for me.

zh: 现在看看我给你买的这个礼物。
en: Now look at this present I got for you.

zh: 啊！梳子。它们在橱窗里已经好几个月了！
en: Ah! The combs. They were in the shop windows for many months!

zh: 是的，漂亮的梳子，镶着宝石边——正好配你美丽头发的颜色。
en: Yes, the beautiful combs, with jeweled rims — just the color to wear in your beautiful hair.

zh: 但是，吉姆。它们是昂贵的梳子。我知道，我的心一直渴望得到它们，却丝毫没有拥有的希望。
en: But, Jim. They are expensive combs. I know, my heart had longed for them without the least hope of owning them.

zh: 现在它们是我的了。谢谢你，吉姆。
en: Now they are mine. Thank you, Jim.

zh: 现在，你会明白为什么我一开始那么沮丧了。
en: Now, you will see why I was upset at first.

zh: 吉姆，你不知道我为你准备了一份多么好——多么漂亮的礼物，好礼物。
en: Jim, you don’t know what a nice — what a beautiful gift, nice gift I’ve got for you.

zh: 抱歉。我完全不知道会是什么。
en: I’m sorry. I have no idea what it could be.

zh: 看！一条金表链！它不可爱吗，吉姆？
en: Look! A gold watch chain! Isn’t it lovely, Jim?

zh: 我找遍了全城才找到它。
en: I hunted all over the town to find it.

zh: 现在你一天得看一百次时间了。
en: You’ll have to look at the time a hundred times a day now.

zh: 把你的表给我。我想看看它配上表链的样子。
en: Give me your watch. I want to see how it looks on it.

zh: 德拉，我们把圣诞礼物收起来，保存一段时间吧。
en: Della, let’s put our Christmas gifts away and keep them for a while.

zh: 它们太好了，不适合现在就使用。
en: They’re too nice to use just at present.

zh: 我卖掉了手表，才换来钱买了这些梳子。
en: I sold the watch to get the money to buy the combs.

zh: 现在，我们吃晚饭吧。
en: Now, let’s have our supper.

zh: 时间过得真快！这个周末我们将从北京国际学校毕业！
en: How time flies! We'll graduate from Beijing International School this weekend!

zh: 是的，而且将会有一个毕业典礼。
en: Yes, and there’s going to be a graduation ceremony.

zh: 我们应该做些什么来准备它呢？
en: What should we do to get ready for it?

zh: 我认为我们应该准备一些礼物。
en: I think we should prepare some gifts.

zh: 但是，首先，我们必须通过我们的期末考试。
en: But, first of all, we must pass our final examination.

zh: 放轻松。我们学习如此努力，我们一定能轻松通过。
en: Take it easy. We have worked so hard that we will be able to pass it easily.

zh: 我们会在典礼上发言吗？
en: Shall we give speeches at the ceremony?

zh: 也许吧。如果是这样，你打算说什么？
en: Perhaps. If so, what are you going to say?

zh: 我会说，我不仅学会了如何学习，还学会了如何做人。
en: I’ll say I have learned not only how to study, but how to be a man.

zh: 回顾过去的三年，我明白了如果我想成功，就必须努力学习。
en: Thinking back on the past three years, I have learned that if I want to succeed, I must study hard.

zh: 嗯，我永远不会忘记这句话：“世上无难事，只怕有心人。”
en: Well, I will never forget the saying, “Nothing is impossible if you set your mind to it.”

zh: 我也会永远记住我们的友谊。
en: I will also remember our friendship forever.

zh: 嗨，苏珊娜！我们的毕业日即将来临，你感到兴奋吗？
en: Hi, Susanna! Are you excited now that our graduation day is just around the corner?

zh: 是的，有一点。我也感到有点难过，因为我们不得不说再见。
en: Yes, a little. I also feel a little sad because we have to say goodbye.

zh: 但我会永远记住我们的友谊。
en: But I will remember our friendship forever.

zh: 顺便问一下，你计划在毕业前做些什么？
en: By the way, what are you planning to do before graduation?

zh: 我计划送给每个同学一份特别的礼物。
en: I plan to send every classmate a special gift.

zh: 我会和他或她一起拍照，并在每张照片的背面写下我最美好的祝愿。
en: I will take photos together with him or her and write my best wishes on the back of each photo.

zh: 三班的孩子们为毕业典礼做得很出色。
en: The children in Class Three have done an excellent job for the graduation ceremony.

zh: 教室的装饰非常漂亮。
en: The decoration of the classroom was very beautiful.

zh: 每个人都准备了几十份礼物，并互相交换。
en: Everyone prepared dozens of presents and exchanged them with each other.

zh: 一些学生在卡片上写下了他们最美好的祝愿，例如“世上无难事，只怕有心人”和“有志者，事竟成”。
en: Some students wrote down their best wishes on the cards, such as “Nothing is impossible if you set your mind to it”, and “Where there is a will, there is a way”.

zh: 这些礼物很便宜，但对于他们记住友谊来说却很珍贵。
en: The presents are cheap, but they are valuable for them to remember the friendship.

zh: 大家好！我感到非常兴奋和开心。
en: Hello, everyone! I feel so excited and so happy.

zh: 我们在这所美丽的学校度过了三年美好的时光。
en: We have had three fantastic years in this beautiful school.

zh: 我们像一家人一样一起学习和生活。
en: We have studied and lived together like a happy family.

zh: 我们也一起度过了很多快乐的时光。
en: We’ve had a lot of fun together, too.

zh: 我从你们所有人身上学到了很多，我亲爱的老师和朋友们。
en: I’ve learned a lot from you all, my dear teachers and friends.

zh: 众所周知，“功夫不负有心人。”
en: As is known to all, “Everything comes to him who waits.”

zh: 所以，如果我想成功，我必须努力学习。
en: So, if I want to succeed, I must study hard.

zh: 我们很快就要互相道别了。
en: We'll say goodbye to each other soon.

zh: 我希望我们的友谊长存。
en: I hope our friendship will last forever.

zh: 我相信它会随着时间的推移而变得越来越珍贵。
en: I’m sure it will be more and more valuable as time goes by.

zh: 因此，我发自内心地感谢你们所有人，并祝愿你们未来成功。
en: So from the bottom of my heart, I thank you all and wish you success in the future.

zh: 早上好，我亲爱的老师和朋友们！
en: Good morning, my dear teachers and friends!

zh: 我对过去三年有许多难忘的回忆。
en: I have many unforgettable memories of the past three years.

zh: 我和我的同学们相处得很好。
en: I got along well with my classmates.

zh: 我们互相帮助，互相学习。
en: We helped and learned from each other.

zh: 令我非常高兴的是，我赢得了班级的优秀学生奖。
en: To my great joy, I won the Excellent Student Award in my class.

zh: 感谢我的老师和父母，我取得了如此大的进步。
en: Thanks to my teachers and my parents, I’ve made so much progress.

zh: 你知道，“学无坦途。”
en: You know, “There is no royal road to learning.”

zh: 所以，我会继续努力学习以实现我的梦想。
en: So, I will keep on working hard to realize my dream.

zh: 我非常爱我们的老师、我们的朋友和我们的学校。
en: I love our teachers, our friends and our school very much.

zh: 我会想念你们所有人。
en: I will miss you all.

zh: 毕业典礼是学生从学校毕业时举行的一种习俗。
en: A graduation ceremony is a custom which takes place when students graduate from a school.

zh: 典礼通常在大礼堂或露天举行。
en: The ceremony is usually held in a big hall or in the open air.

zh: 在典礼期间，通常会有几位学生发表演讲，校长和一些老师也会这样做。
en: During the ceremony, it is common for several students to give speeches, and so do the principal and some teachers.

zh: 然后每位毕业生会收到一份毕业证书。
en: Then each graduate receives a diploma.

zh: 它表明该学生已成功完成所有课程或通过了考试。
en: It shows that the student has successfully completed all the courses or has passed the examinations.

zh: 典礼结束后，学生们通常会与前来祝贺他们的老师、朋友和亲戚聊天。
en: After the ceremony, students often chat with their teachers, friends and relatives who come to congratulate them.

zh: 他们还会互相拍照，并谈论他们的未来。
en: They also take photos with one another and talk about their future.

zh: 毕业典礼是令人兴奋的，因为它标志着学生学校生活中一个阶段的结束。
en: The graduation ceremony is exciting because it marks the end of a period in a student’s school life.

zh: 它也是悲伤的，因为他们与朋友一起学习的时光已经结束。
en: It is also sad because the time when they studied with friends has come to an end.

zh: 毕业意味着改变，意味着将难忘的面孔和地方留在身后。
en: Graduation means change, and leaving unforgettable faces and places behind.

zh: 然而，改变总是带来新的可能性。
en: However, change always brings about new possibilities.

zh: 放轻松。我们学习如此努力，一定能轻松通过考试。
en: Take it easy. We have worked so hard that we will be able to pass it easily.

zh: 我希望我们的友谊能永远持续。
en: I hope our friendship will last forever.

zh: 我确信随着时间的推移，它会变得越来越珍贵。
en: I’m sure it will be more and more valuable as time goes by.

zh: 迈克尔：简在哪里？她到机场了吗？
en: Michael: Where is Jane? Has she arrived at the airport yet?

zh: 如果她不快点，她会错过飞机的！
en: She will miss her plane if she doesn’t hurry!

zh: 玛丽亚：我相信她随时都会加入我们。
en: Maria: I’m sure she’ll join us any minute now.

zh: 康康：哦。她来了！她来得正好。
en: Kangkang: Oh. Here she comes! She’s just in time.

zh: 迈克尔：嘿，简！我们在这里。
en: Michael: Hey, Jane! We’re here.

zh: 我们以为你要错过你的飞机了。
en: We thought you were going to miss your plane.

zh: 简：对不起。很难出发，因为很多人想和我的家人道别。
en: Jane: Sorry. It was hard to set off because so many people wanted to say goodbye to my family.

zh: 康康：在这里看着你们都回家，我很难过。
en: Kangkang: I’m sad to be here watching you all heading back home.

zh: 迈克尔：来吧，康康！我们总有一天会再见面的。
en: Michael: Come on, Kangkang! We will meet again some day.

zh: 玛丽亚：迈克尔，我知道你不喜欢写信，但你必须答应经常给我们发电子邮件。
en: Maria: Michael, I know you don’t like to write, but you must promise to send e-mails to us often.

zh: 等你回到美国后，不要
en: After you get back to the USA, don’t do

zh: 不要在你的滑板上做任何疯狂的事情，否则我会担心你。
en: anything crazy on your skateboard, or I will worry about you.

zh: 别担心，玛丽亚。我不会再那样做了，我会好好照顾自己。
en: Don’t worry, Maria. I won’t do that again and I will take good care of myself.

zh: 让我们保持联系。
en: Let’s keep in touch with each other.

zh: 简，你要坐哪趟航班？
en: Jane, which flight will you take?

zh: 对不起，我现在必须走了。
en: I’m sorry I have to go now.

zh: 你是我们最好的朋友。
en: You are our best friend.

zh: 我希望你有一个美好的未来。
en: I hope you will have a great future.

zh: 我期待着在你的电子邮件中读到它。
en: I’m looking forward to reading about it in your e-mails.

zh: 保重，我的好朋友。
en: Take care, my good friend.

zh: 两个朋友正穿过沙漠行走。
en: Two friends were walking through the desert.

zh: 在旅途中他们发生了争执，那个高个子的男孩打了矮个子男孩一记耳光。
en: During the journey they had an argument, and the taller boy slapped the shorter one in the face.

zh: 矮个子男孩受伤了。
en: The shorter boy was hurt.

zh: 但什么也没说，他在沙子上写道：“今天我最好的朋友打了我一记耳光。”
en: But without saying anything, he wrote in the sand, “Today my best friend slapped me in the face.”

zh: 他们继续行走，直到发现了一个池塘。
en: They kept on walking till they found a pond.

zh: 他们决定在那里洗个澡。
en: And they decided to take a bath there.

zh: 但矮个子男孩陷进了泥里，开始下沉。
en: But the shorter boy got stuck in the mud and started to sink.

zh: 幸运的是，他被他的朋友拉到了安全的地方。
en: Luckily, he was pulled to safety by his friend.

zh: 之后，他在一块石头上刻下：“今天我最好的朋友救了我的命。”
en: After that, he carved on a stone, “Today my best friend saved my life.”

zh: 高个子男孩问他：“在我伤害你之后，你把它写在沙子上，但现在你把它刻在石头上。为什么？”
en: The taller boy asked him, “After I hurt you, you wrote it in the sand, but now you carve it on the stone. Why?”

zh: 矮个子男孩回答说：“当有人伤害你时，你应该把它写在沙子上，风可以轻易地把它抹去。
en: The shorter boy replied, “When someone hurts you, you should write it in the sand from which the wind can erase it easily.

zh: 然而，当有人为你做了好事，你应该把它刻在石头上，风永远无法把它抹去。”
en: However, when someone does something good for you, you should carve it on a stone from which the wind can never erase it.”

zh: 中国是一个有着约五千年历史的伟大国家。
en: China is a great country that has about 5 000 years of history.

zh: 它们（长江与黄河）是中国文化的发源地。
en: They're the birthplaces of Chinese culture.

zh: 我可以拿《中国指南》给你。
en: I can fetch you Guide to China.

zh: 这本书详细地介绍了中国。
en: It’s a book which introduces China in detail.

zh: 在古代中国，皇帝们认为自己是真龙天子。
en: In ancient China, emperors thought that they themselves were real dragons and the sons of Heaven.

zh: 整个古城墙由许多支线构成，全长约8 800千米。
en: The entire wall, which has many branches, is about 8800 kilometers long.

zh: 东起山海关，西至嘉峪关。
en: It stretches from Shanhaiguan in the east to Jiayuguan in the west.

zh: 我们的商品新市场从亚洲延伸到美洲。
en: New markets for our goods stretch from Asia to the America.

zh: 那些明朝的统治者没有预料到它(长城)以后会用于吸引游客到中国。
en: Those Ming dynasty rulers did not expect that it would later be used to bring tourists into China.

zh: 不到长城非好汉。
en: he who has never been to the Great Wall is not a true man.

zh: 一千多年前，产自中国的茶叶，连同丝绸和瓷器开始被世人所知，并且从那时起茶叶就一直是中国重要的出口产品。
en: Tea from China, along with silk and porcelain, began to be known by the world over a thousand years ago and has been an important Chinese export since then.

zh: 君子之交淡如水。
en: The friendship between gentlemen is like a cup of tea.

zh: 开门七件事：柴、米、油、盐、酱、醋、茶。
en: Firewood, rice, oil, salt, sauce, vinegar and tea are necessary to begin a day.

zh: 他是一位伟大的思想家，对人类本性和行为有许多明智的见解。
en: He was a great thinker who had many wise ideas about human nature and behavior.

zh: 他（孔子）也是一位著名的哲学家，他的至理名言对不同国家的许多人产生了影响。
en: He was also a famous philosopher whose wise sayings have influenced many people in different countries.

zh: 学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆。
en: He who learns but does not think is lost; he who thinks but does not learn is in danger.

zh: 孔子在30多岁时开始讲学。
en: In his thirties, Confucius began to teach.

zh: 三人行，必有我师。
en: When I walk along with two others, I may be able to learn from them.

zh: 知之为知之，不知为不知。
en: What you know, you know; what you don't know, you don't know.

zh: 温故而知新。
en: Learn the new while reviewing the old.

zh: 有朋自远方来，不亦乐乎？
en: Isn't it a pleasure that friends come to see you from far away?

zh: 己所不欲，勿施于人。
en: Do not do to others what you would not have them do to you.

zh: 他（郑和）的最后一次航海比哥伦布发现美洲大陆的首次航行还要早半个多世纪。
en: His last ocean journey was more than half a century earlier than Columbus’ first journey to America.

zh: 不幸的是，他（郑和）于1433年因病死于自非洲返途的路上。
en: Unfortunately, he died of illness on his way home from Africa in 1433.

zh: 在那里（美国），他（钱学森）取得了航空航天和数学双博士学位。
en: There he received his Ph.D. degrees in both aerospace and mathematics.

zh: 毕业后，他就开始从事火箭与导弹理论的教学与研究工作。
en: After he graduated, he became a teacher as well as a researcher who studied rockets and missile theories.

zh: 从那以后，他（钱学森）负责推进中国导弹、火箭和航天器的研发项目。
en: From then on, he was in charge of developing China’s missile, rocket and spacecraft research programs.

zh: 他是这些相关领域的先驱，被誉为“中国导弹之父”。
en: He was a pioneer in these related fields and was honored as “The Father of China’s Missiles”.

zh: 他是中国人的骄傲。
en: He is the pride of the Chinese people.

zh: 我的事业在中国，我的成就在中国，我的归宿也在中国！
en: My career is in China, my success is in China and my destination is in China!

zh: 他（钱学森）笑着说：“我姓钱，但我不爱钱。”
en: he laughed and said, “My family name is Qian, but I don’t like qian.”

zh: （汉字模上的）汉字被印在纸上后，这些小黏土块或木块可被再次使用。
en: After the characters were printed on paper, the pieces of clay or wood could be used again.

zh: 她（英国女王）让（铸钟师）铸造了大本钟以便大家有一个统一的时间。
en: She had it built so that everyone would have the same time.

zh: （居里夫人）不仅发现了镭，而且一生中两次获得诺贝尔奖。
en: Not only did she discover radium but also she won the Nobel Prize twice in her lifetime.

zh: 在他（爱迪生）的一生中，他拥有2,000多项发明，其中包括电灯、电报和胶卷。
en: During his lifetime he invented more than 2,000 new things, including the light bulb, the telegraph and photographic film.

zh: 他（林肯）家很穷，因此他们不得不为生计而奋斗。
en: The family was poor, so they had to struggle just to live.

zh: 美国内战在南北方之间展开，南方各州试图脱离联邦并建立自己的国家，而北方各州想要保持一个统一的国家。
en: The Civil War was between the southern states that wanted to leave the Union and form their own country, and the northern states that wanted to keep all the states as one country.

zh: 不到一个星期，1865年4月14日，亚伯拉罕·林肯在华盛顿的福特剧院遭受枪击。
en: Less than a week later, on April 14, 1865, Abraham Lincoln was shot at the Ford Theatre in Washington, DC.

zh: 第二天死于枪伤。
en: He died the next day from his wounds.

zh: 金字塔的建成展示了古埃及劳动人民的智慧与成就。
en: The completion of the Great Pyramid shows the wisdom and the achievements of ancient Egyptian working people.

zh: 那里（西湖）的许多旅游景点非常值得一看，例如：苏堤、断桥和雷峰塔。
en: Many tourist attractions there are well worth visiting, such as Sudi Causeway, the Broken Bridge and Leifeng Pagoda.

zh: 在空闲时间,我比较喜欢看电视,尤其是电视剧。
en: In my spare time, I prefer watching TV especially TV plays.

zh: 我认为那些女演员很迷人。
en: I think the actresses are attractive.

zh: 比起那些节目,我更愿意看体育节目。
en: I would rather watch sports shows than those ones.

zh: 她宁死不屈。
en: She'd rather die than give in to the enemy.

zh: 比起踢足球我更愿意打篮球。
en: I would rather play basketball than soccer.

zh: 事实上,许多住在城里的人更愿意生活在乡村。
en: In fact, many people living in the city would rather live in the country.

zh: 这部电影取材于一部科幻小说。
en: This movie is based on a science fiction story.

zh: 这份报告是以他最近的研究为基础的。
en: The report is based on his recent research.

zh: 公元2020年,首次载人火星探测任务遭遇了一场神秘风暴。除一人外,其余人员全部丧生。
en: In the year 2020 A.D., a mysterious storm kills all but one crew member of the first manned mission to Mars.

zh: 评选2009年度最佳电影的第82届奥斯卡颁奖典礼于2010年3月7日（星期天）在好莱坞的柯达剧院举行。
en: The 82nd Academy Awards Ceremony, honoring the best in film for 2009, was held on Sunday, March 7, 2010, at the Kodak Theatre in Hollywood.

zh: 此次展出是对毕加索艺术生涯的总体回顾。
en: It is a general review of Picasso's career.

zh: 他（孙悟空）是中国古典文学四大名著之一《西游记》中的一位主人公。
en: He is a hero in the novel called Journey to the West, which is one of the four classic novels of Chinese literature.

zh: 实际上，正是沙僧和猪八戒帮助孙悟空取得了每一次战斗的胜利。
en: In fact, it was Sandy and Pigsy who helped the Monkey King win every battle.

zh: 独木不成林。
en: One tree can’t make a forest.

zh: 他（李白）被认为是中国最伟大的浪漫主义诗人之一。
en: He is considered to be one of the best romantic poets in China.

zh: 我读过一篇有关他（李白）的文章，说他和英国诗人威廉·莎士比亚一样伟大。
en: The passage I read about him said that he was as great as the British poet William Shakespeare.

zh: 《罗密欧与朱丽叶》在全世界广受欢迎，这部戏剧中最令人悲伤的一幕是朱丽叶吻别罗密欧然后死去的场景。
en: Romeo and Juliet is very popular around the world, and one of the saddest scenes in this play is when Juliet kisses Romeo and then dies.

zh: 为感觉更好一些，他（威廉·华兹华斯）喜欢在山林中徒步长行或者乘船旅行。
en: To feel better, he loved to go for long walks in the mountains or to take boat rides.

zh: 他想象力丰富，创作了有关自然力量、自然美景与自然奥秘的诗歌。
en: He had a strong imagination, and wrote poems about the power, beauty and mystery of nature.

zh: 每当天边的彩虹映入人眼帘，我的心便会欢悦跳动；
en: My heart leaps up when I behold a rainbow in the sky;

zh: 在生命初绽的童年时如此；
en: So was it when my life began;

zh: 到已是成年的今天仍然如此；
en: So it is now I am a man;

zh: 将来老去也会如此，否则不如一死了之！
en: So be it when I shall grow old, or let me die!

zh: 孩童是成人之父；
en: The Child is father of the Man;

zh: 我希望生命中的每一天都跃动着对自然的虔诚与敬慕。
en: And I could wish my days to be bound each to each by natural piety.

zh: 因为如果不送礼物给你，我就不能安心过圣诞节，所以我把头发剪掉卖钱了。
en: I had my hair cut off and sold it because I couldn't have lived through Christmas without giving you a present.

zh: 他的父亲经历了两次世界大战。
en: His father has lived through the two world wars.

zh: 我要说的是我不仅学会了如何学习，而且学会了如何做人。
en: I have learned not only how to study, but how to be a man.

zh: 回想起过去的三年，我懂得了要想成功，就必须努力学习。
en: Thinking back on the past three years, I have learned that if I want to succeed, I must study hard.

zh: 世上无难事，只怕有心人。/有志者，事竟成。
en: Nothing is impossible if you set your mind to it.

zh: 我们毕业的日子就要到了，你兴奋吗？
en: Are you excited now that our graduation day is just around the corner?

zh: 众所周知，“功夫不负有心人”。
en: As is known to all, “Everything comes to him who waits.”

zh: 你知道，“书山有路勤为径，学海无涯苦作舟”。
en: You know, “There is no royal road to learning.”

zh: 毕业典礼是学生们从学校毕业时举行的一种仪式。
en: A graduation ceremony is a custom which takes place when students graduate from a school.

zh: 它（毕业典礼）也是令人伤感的，因为和朋友一起学习的时光已经结束。
en: It is also sad because the time when they studied with friends has come to an end.

zh: 毕业意味着变化，意味着把那些难以忘却的面孔和地方留在记忆深处。
en: Graduation means change, and leaving unforgettable faces and places behind.

zh: 他既会开车又会修车。
en: He can both drive a car and repair it.

zh: 康康在课堂内外都经常说英语。
en: Kangkang often speaks English both in class and after class.

zh: 不仅我父亲而且我们大家都盼望着见到我叔叔。
en: Not only my father but (also) all of us are looking forward to meeting my uncle.

zh: 她不但歌唱得好，而且舞也跳得好。
en: She can not only sing but also dance well.

zh: 许多学生明天要去公园。
en: Many students are going to the park tomorrow.

zh: 吉姆有一个漂亮的风筝。
en: Jim has a nice kite.

zh: 汤姆和玛丽每天乘公共汽车上学。
en: Tom and Mary go to school by bus every day.

zh: 肉和面包都吃光了。
en: Both meat and bread are eaten up.

zh: 这个作家兼演讲家现在正在她的家乡做关于中国文化的演讲。
en: The writer and speaker is giving a speech on Chinese culture in her hometown now.

zh: 我们每人都有一台新电脑。
en: Each of us has a new computer.

zh: 没有一个学生喜欢这款电脑游戏。
en: No student likes this kind of computer game.

zh: 孩子们都不喜欢这门课。
en: No children like this subject.

zh: 水一点儿也没有剩。
en: None of the water was left.

zh: 学生中谁也没去过那座岛。
en: None of the students has/have ever been to the island.

zh: 我父母都不喜欢京剧。
en: Neither of my parents is/are interested in Beijing Opera.

zh: 七小时的时间真长。
en: Seven hours is really a very long time.

zh: 四百美元对这次旅行来说足够了。
en: Four hundred dollars is enough for this trip.

zh: 九千米不算远。
en: Nine kilometers is not very far.

zh: 他的家庭是一个大家庭。
en: His family is a big one.

zh: 当我顺路拜访时，这家人正在吃晚餐。
en: The family were having supper when I dropped in.

zh: 警察正在帮助人们进入大厅。
en: The police are helping people enter the hall.

zh: 一两个朋友今晚要来。
en: One or two friends are coming this evening.

zh: 你和她都不是工程师。
en: Neither you nor she is an engineer.

zh: 不但我有一部车，汤姆也有一部。
en: Not only I but also Tom has a car.

zh: 课桌上有一支钢笔和两支铅笔。
en: There is a pen and two pencils on the desk.

zh: 课桌上有两支铅笔和一支钢笔。
en: There are two pencils and a pen on the desk.
